name: pixletter
description: Open-source email tracking, $0/month, hosted on Cloudflare
author: kame_lift <https://github.com/dkamehat>

scripts.db:seed:self: wrangler d1 execute pixletter-db --remote --config=apps/api/wrangler.toml --command="INSERT OR IGNORE INTO tenants (id, name, plan, monthly_email_limit, reset_at) VALUES ('self', 'Self', 'self', 100000, unixepoch() + 2592000); INSERT OR IGNORE INTO users (id, tenant_id, email, name) VALUES ('self', 'self', 'self@localhost', 'Self User');"
